features: 🚀【Space Birthday Banner】: Various cartoon space designs- Outer Space Astronauts Rockets UFO Satellites. And the letters "HAPPY BIRTHDAY" in blue colours are linked together. This unique space birthday banner design is perfect for boys and girls of all ages.
🚀【Package Include】: The banner set includes two pre-assembled banners for the birthday party. Happy Birthday letter banner and dinosaur shape banner all include 13pcs cards and 2 strings.

🚀【Easy to Use】: With pre-punched holes on each card, they are easy to be strung with ribbons. The cards can be moved to your desired space interval. The Plastic needle helps you string cards together easily in a second. Easy to keep and store.

🚀【High Quality】: The outer space happy birthday banners are crafted with high-quality cardboard paper with outer space designs and colors, will surely capture the attention of your guests; the cut-outs are made of cardstock material, no color fading and bad smells, for indoor occasions, suitable for repeatly usage in different accasions with easy setup.

🚀【Wide Application】: This astronauts happy birthday banner for birthday decor, which will make a unique addition to the party and create great memories for your kid. They can be hung on ceiling, walls, windows, tree branches, doors and any other places, excellent indoor or outdoor decoration. Good props for your kid photo.
description: Product Description Outer Space Happy Birthday Banner for Astronauts Rockets UFO Theme Birthday Party Hanging Wall Decorations Every child is looking forward to their birthday very much. Add the sweetest space theme to your little one's party with the Happy Birthday Construction Banner! Outer space Birthday Banner is the perfect birthday gift for kids. Let them have a happy and unforgettable birthday. Celebrate your birthday with this brilliant hanging banner, and let your kids, friends, family and guests enjoy their time. This unique space birthday banner design is perfect for boys and girls of all ages. Space Happy Birthday Banner Party Decoration Special Events This adorable novelty banner will absolutely light up the party and your house! It will be a great surprise for your guests and bring out much laugh and fun to fulfill your day! Hanging place could be room ceiling, wall, window, etc. and all as you can imagine or your school, party etc. It will add extra fun and new look and create a happy atmosphere. Specifications Material: Paper Color: Blue Letter: HAPPY BIRTHDAY Apply For: birthday, baby shower You can put them on any where you like, for example, baby room, bedroom for kids, fireplace, living room, wall and outdoor. Package Including 1 x "HAPPY BIRTHDAY" Banner Bunting Outer Space Birthday Banner is the perfect birthday gift for kids. Let them have a happy and unforgettable birthday. Note: 1. Ribbon and cards come separately, you need to assemble them with ribbon. 2. Please allow slight dimension differences due to different manual measurements. 3. Due to the influence of the shooting light, there may be slight colour differences in the actual color, please refer to it.
